SHARE PURCHASE AGREEMENT

This Share Purchase Agreement ("Agreement") is made and entered into as of this 15th day of October, 2023, by and between:

1. Dr. Tan Wei Ming (NRIC No. S2345678B), residing at 123 Orchid Road, Singapore 567890, and reachable at +65 9123 4567, email: dr.tanweiming@example.sg

2. Ms. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah (NRIC No. S3456789C), residing at 456 Dahlia Avenue, Singapore 678901, and reachable at +65 9234 5678, email: ms.sitiaishah@example.sg

3. Muthu Holdings Pte. Ltd. (UEN: T23LL0001K), a company incorporated under the laws of Singapore, with its registered office at 789 Lavender Street, Singapore 345678.

WHEREAS, Dr. Tan Wei Ming and Ms. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah (collectively, the "Sellers") own 100% of the shares in Muthu Holdings Pte. Ltd., and have agreed to sell to the Purchaser (as defined below) for a total purchase price of SGD 2,500,000 (Singapore Dollars Two Million Five Hundred Thousand).

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties hereto have executed this Agreement on the date first above written.
